answers: Telescope types: refractor (lens, low maintenance), reflector (mirror, bigger aperture cheaper), compound (best of both).
Beginner telescopes: Celestron StarSense Explorer (auto-find objects), Orion StarBlast, Sky-Watcher Heritage. $200-400 range.
Tips: aperture matters most (bigger = more light), start with Moon and planets, use star chart app, and be patient.
Durbin tips: shohor er baire jao (light pollution komay), Moon diye shuru koro, Saturn ar Jupiter onek sundor dekha jay.
